message:
fix: Complete AST traversal in mutation_analysis.zig and statements.zig

Add missing orelse_body handlers for for/while loops and match_stmt
handlers in AST traversal functions:

mutation_analysis.zig:
- countAssignmentsWithScope: add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body, match_stmt

statements.zig (type inference):
- visitStmtScoped: add for_stmt/while_stmt orelse_body

This ensures complete AST traversal for Python code that uses
while/else, for/else constructs and match statements.
